mgmt_welcome_subtitle: Securely manage your identity and authentication
mgmt_secure_authentication_desc: Protect your account with advanced security features
mgmt_manage_passkeys: Manage your passkeys for secure, passwordless authentication
mgmt_linked_accounts_desc: Connect multiple accounts in one place
mgmt_privacy_matters_desc: We keep your data safe and private

mgmt_password_not_available: Password reset is not available for this account.
mgmt_password_not_available_desc: Your account is managed through your organization's identity provider. Please contact your system administrator for password assistance.
mgmt_password_too_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters long and strong.
mgmt_passkeys_not_available: Passkeys are not available for this account.
mgmt_passkeys_not_available_desc: Your account is managed through your organization's identity provider. Passkey management is handled by your organization.
mgmt_passkey_usage_definition: Passkeys offer a secure way to sign in to your account using only your fingerprint, facial recognition, device screen lock, or a hardware security key. They can also function as an extra verification step when you choose to log in with your password. To maintain their security, always keep your screen locks confidential and store your hardware security keys in a safe place, ensuring no one else can access them.
mgmt_confirm_delete_passkey: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey?
